disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A small tender red bump on the posterior thigh 5 days ago has rapidly enlarged over the last 48 hours into a large, firm, very painful lump
trigger_question_examples: When did you first notice the lump?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started as a little red bump about five days ago, but in the last two days it has blown up into this big hard painful lump.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The centre of the lump became soft yesterday and now has a yellow-white pointing head (mature, pointing collection)
trigger_question_examples: What does the centre of the lump look like now?
Is there any head or discharge?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The middle went soft and squishy yesterday and today there's a yellow-white head on it, like it wants to burst.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The skin around the lump is red and hot and the redness is spreading beyond the lump itself
trigger_question_examples: Is the redness spreading into the skin around the lump?
Does the skin around it feel hot?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, the skin all around it is red and hot now and the redness seems to be creeping outwards.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New low-grade fever and generalised feeling of being unwell over the last 12 hours
trigger_question_examples: Have you felt feverish or unwell in yourself?
Any shivers or feeling hot and cold?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Since this morning I've felt hot and shivery and just generally awful, which is new.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: History of recurrent staphylococcal skin infections and a documented MRSA infection about 2 years ago
trigger_question_examples: Have you had boils or skin infections like this before?
Any past problems with resistant bacteria such as golden staph?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I get boils a lot, and a couple of years ago a swab showed I had golden staph, the resistant kind.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe mechanical pain preventing sitting and limiting walking; patient lives alone
trigger_question_examples: How is this affecting what you can do?
Is there anyone at home with you?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't sit at all and it hurts to walk, and I live on my own so there's no one here to help.
